description_long: This is a fictional, futuristic fighter airplane with a sleek, elongated fuselage and a distinctive X-shaped wing configuration. The wings are mid-mounted and splay outward, each tipped with cylindrical engine nacelles and laser-like protrusions. The body is primarily light gray with bold red-orange markings and weathered detailing, suggesting heavy use. The cockpit is forward-mounted and enclosed, with a dark canopy that blends into the fuselage. The rear features four prominent engine exhausts, and the tail is minimal, integrated into the overall streamlined design. The landing gear is not visible, implying it may be retractable or absent in this depiction.
description: A sleek, gray and red futuristic fighter airplane with X-shaped wings, four engine nacelles, and a forward-enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the X-shaped wing configuration, red-orange markings, and the elongated fuselage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the four cylindrical engine exhausts and the splayed wings with laser-like tips.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view revealing the underside of the wings and fuselage, with visible engine nacelles and red markings.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical spread of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, X-shaped configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets; wings splay outward with slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Four cylindrical jet engines mounted at the ends of each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Minimal tail with a single, integrated vertical stabilizer; no separate horizontal stabilizers visible.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable or absent in this depiction.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single-seat.
